text: Live updates: Push for US-Iran talks gains momentum as White House expresses optimism for deal - CNN

text: 3 things to know about naval blockades as U.S. begins patrols in the Strait of Hormuz - NPR

text: Trump wants a Tax Day victory lap in Las Vegas. The city’s economy isn’t cooperating. - Politico

text: Floodwaters inundate Wisconsin streets, trapping drivers, as Midwest rebuilds after powerful storms - NBC News

text: China’s Economy Revs Up Despite War as Growth Tops Forecasts - Bloomberg.com
